file: campaign for launching DNA collection of style by PNJ.png
title: PNJ × TikTok — Discover My Character
subtitle: Social Campaign | 2023

paragraphs: Multi-channel brand campaign for PNJ jewellery in partnership with TikTok, centered around the 'Discover My Character' competition. Leveraged KOL content, offline event activation, and TikTok challenge format to drive jewellery brand engagement among Gen Z consumers in Vietnam.
bullets: Designed TikTok challenge format around self-expression and jewellery styling
Developed KOL brief and content guidelines for participating influencers
Created offline event concept to drive both online buzz and in-store footfall
Designed user-generated content strategy to maximize organic reach
Established campaign performance metrics and tracking framework
Modernised PNJ's brand image to appeal to Gen Z while maintaining premium jewellery positioning

campaign.name: PNJ Discover My Character
campaign.objective: Modernise PNJ's brand image to appeal to Gen Z while maintaining premium jewellery positioning and driving both online engagement and in-store footfall
campaign.target_audience: Gen Z consumers in Vietnam interested in fashion, self-expression, and jewellery
campaign.insight: Gen Z consumers engage with brands that enable self-expression — a jewellery TikTok challenge that lets users 'discover their character' through styling creates organic, shareable content without forcing a hard sell
strategy: TikTok challenge format centered on self-expression and jewellery styling
KOL brief and content guidelines for beauty and fashion influencers
Offline event activation bridging online challenge and in-store experience
User-generated content strategy to amplify organic reach
Campaign performance tracking across online engagement and retail footfall

design.layout: Social campaign case study with platform emphasis
design.typography: Bold, modern sans-serif; social platform branding

summary: PNJ × TikTok 'Discover My Character' campaign — TikTok challenge, KOL activation, and offline event strategy to modernize PNJ jewellery's brand image for Gen Z consumers.
